candidate.summary: Add CLI regression coverage proving final rollup returns at least 10 actionable Feature Depth Recommendations.
candidate.reason: Operators rely on final rollup output for continuation. The CLI output must not become shallow even if internal builders keep passing.

expected_behavior: ao-mission final rollup emits at least 10 recommendations.
Each recommendation has owner, task, gate, continuation command, exact next action, minimum estimated minutes, and evidence requirements.
The final rollup remains read-only and does not execute, approve, or call providers.
rollback: Revert the added CLI test and node evidence.
